tasks.name: Captain's Log Database Backup
tasks.description: Daily PostgreSQL dump, gzipped, kept for 30 days

tasks.name: Captain's Log File Uploads Backup
tasks.description: Weekly rsync of uploaded files to backup location

tasks.name: Captain's Log Config Backup
tasks.description: Backup nginx, env, PM2 configs to local archive

tasks.name: Captain's Log Health Check
tasks.description: Verify app is running and database is responsive

tasks.name: Prune Expired Backups
tasks.description: Remove backups older than retention period
